raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1445 allows student members of school boards across California to have a say in the expulsion procedures of their peers.",
    "SB 1445 recognizes the valuable perspectives that students bring to discussions about student discipline and school safety.",
    "Involving students in the expulsion process aims to create a school system that not only corrects behavior but also heals and strengthens school communities.",
    "The California Association of Student Councils (CASC) has been committed to elevating student voices and promoting key legislative initiatives since its establishment in 1947.",
    "The SB 1445 bill was initiated by students from across California during the Student Advisory Board on Legislation in Education (SABLE) conference."
  ]
}
```
